mapper.sql: SELECT t.SEQ_NO, t.DL_DT, t.DL_TM, t.DL_TYP_CCD, t.DL_AMT, t.DL_CCY, t.CNTRP_AC_NO, t.CNTRP_NM, t.CNTRP_BNK_CD, t.CHNL_CCD, t.MN_DL_BRN_CD, c.DL_P_RNMCNO, a.GNL_AC_NO, c.REG_DT FROM NIC73B t JOIN NIC66B c ON c.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = t.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND c.SSPS_DL_ID = t.SSPS_DL_ID LEFT JOIN NIC75B a ON a.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = t.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND a.SSPS_DL_ID = t.SSPS_DL_ID
mapper.select: WHERE c.DL_P_RNMCNO = #{custNo} ORDER BY t.DL_DT DESC, t.DL_TM DESC
